case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS. CLEVELAND VALENTINE

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT VALENTINE, CLEVELAND JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
